task.name: Create CurrencyInput component
task.action:
Create `src/components/ui/currency-input.tsx`.
The component must: - Use `React.forwardRef` matching the Shadcn Input pattern from `src/components/ui/input.tsx`. - Accept props: `value: number`, `onValueChange: (value: number) => void`, plus all standard input HTML attributes except `value`, `onChange`, and `type`. - Render the Shadcn `Input` from `@/components/ui/input` with `type="text"` and `inputMode="decimal"`. - Maintain internal `displayValue` state as a comma-formatted string. - On change: strip all chars except digits and `.`, prevent multiple decimal points, parse to number, call `onValueChange`, reformat display string with commas, and manage cursor position. - Sync display when `value` prop changes externally (form reset, edit mode init) via `useEffect`. - Empty field = value of `0`, display of `""`. - Support decimals.
Formatting helpers (inside the file): - `formatNumber(num: number): string` ŌĆö converts number to comma-formatted string. Returns "" for 0. - `parseNumber(str: string): number` ŌĆö strips commas, parses to number. Returns 0 for invalid/empty. - `formatForDisplay(rawStr: string): string` ŌĆö formats the raw input string (preserving trailing decimal during typing).
Cursor management: count commas in old display before cursor, count in new display, adjust position via `requestAnimationFrame`.
task.verify: 1. File exists and compiles: `npx tsc --noEmit src/components/ui/currency-input.tsx` (or full `npm run build`). 2. `npm run lint` ŌĆö no errors.

task.name: Integrate CurrencyInput into transaction forms
task.action:
Modify 5 files. In each, add `import { CurrencyInput } from "@/components/ui/currency-input"` and replace the amount `Input` with `CurrencyInput`.
**Files and fields:** 1. `src/components/forms/CreateIncomeTransactionSheet.tsx` ŌĆö `amount` field 2. `src/components/forms/CreateIncomeTransactionDrawer.tsx` ŌĆö `amount` field 3. `src/components/forms/CreateExpenseTransactionSheet.tsx` ŌĆö `amount` field (NOT `installmentDuration` ŌĆö that stays as `Input type="number"`) 4. `src/components/forms/CreateExpenseTransactionDrawer.tsx` ŌĆö `amount` field (NOT `installmentDuration`) 5. `src/components/forms/EditIncomeDrawer.tsx` ŌĆö `amount` field
**Pattern ŌĆö BEFORE (same in all files):** ```tsx <Input type="number" placeholder="0" className='[&::-webkit-outer-spin-button]:appearance-none [&::-webkit-inner-spin-button]:appearance-none [-moz-appearance:textfield]' {...field} disabled={isCreating} /> ```
**Pattern ŌĆö AFTER:** ```tsx <CurrencyInput placeholder="0" value={field.value} onValueChange={field.onChange} onBlur={field.onBlur} name={field.name} ref={field.ref} disabled={isCreating} /> ```
Note: The `disabled` prop name may vary (`isCreating`, `isUpdating`, etc.) ŌĆö preserve whatever exists. Note: Remove `Input` from imports only if it is no longer used in that file (expense transaction forms still use `Input` for `installmentDuration`).
task.verify: 1. `npm run lint` ŌĆö no errors. 2. `npm run build` ŌĆö succeeds.

phase.name: 3: Transfer and Expense Edit Form Integration

task.name: Integrate CurrencyInput into transfer forms and EditExpenseDrawer
task.action:
Modify 4 files. These have multiple currency fields (amount + feeAmount for transfers, amount + installmentDuration for expense edit).
**Files and fields:** 1. `src/components/forms/CreateTransferSheet.tsx` ŌĆö `amount` AND `feeAmount` (both get CurrencyInput) 2. `src/components/forms/CreateTransferDrawer.tsx` ŌĆö `amount` AND `feeAmount` 3. `src/components/forms/EditTransferDrawer.tsx` ŌĆö `amount` AND `feeAmount` 4. `src/components/forms/EditExpenseDrawer.tsx` ŌĆö `amount` only (NOT `installmentDuration` ŌĆö that stays as `Input type="number"`)
Same BEFORE/AFTER pattern as Phase 2.
Note: Transfer forms have a fee checkbox that conditionally renders the `feeAmount` field ŌĆö preserve that conditional rendering, just swap the `Input` inside it.
task.verify: 1. `npm run lint` ŌĆö no errors. 2. `npm run build` ŌĆö succeeds.

task.name: Integrate CurrencyInput into installment forms
task.action:
Modify 2 files. Each has an `amount` field (labeled "Total amount") that is currency.
**Files:** 1. `src/components/installments/EditInstallmentSheet.tsx` ŌĆö `amount` field 2. `src/components/installments/EditInstallmentDrawer.tsx` ŌĆö `amount` field
Same BEFORE/AFTER pattern. The `disabled` prop is `isUpdating` in these files.
Note: These files may have a `FormDescription` showing monthly amount below the input ŌĆö preserve it.
task.verify: 1. `npm run lint` ŌĆö no errors. 2. `npm run build` ŌĆö succeeds.

task.name: Integrate CurrencyInput into income/expense type forms (budget limits and income goals)
task.action:
Modify 8 files. Each has a single currency field for budget limit or income goal.
**Files:** 1. `src/components/forms/CreateExpenseTypeSheet.tsx` ŌĆö budget limit field 2. `src/components/forms/CreateExpenseTypeDrawer.tsx` ŌĆö budget limit field 3. `src/components/forms/EditExpenseTypeSheet.tsx` ŌĆö budget limit field 4. `src/components/forms/EditExpenseTypeDrawer.tsx` ŌĆö budget limit field 5. `src/components/forms/CreateIncomeTypeSheet.tsx` ŌĆö income goal field 6. `src/components/forms/CreateIncomeTypeDrawer.tsx` ŌĆö income goal field 7. `src/components/forms/EditIncomeTypeSheet.tsx` ŌĆö income goal field 8. `src/components/forms/EditIncomeTypeDrawer.tsx` ŌĆö income goal field
Same BEFORE/AFTER pattern as other form integrations.
task.verify: 1. `npm run lint` ŌĆö no errors. 2. `npm run build` ŌĆö succeeds.

task.name: Integrate CurrencyInput into SetTargetDialog
task.verify: 1. `npm run lint` ŌĆö no errors. 2. `npm run build` ŌĆö succeeds.

task.name: Integrate CurrencyInput into IncomeTable, ExpenseTable, and TransferTable inline editing
task.verify: 1. `npm run lint` ŌĆö no errors. 2. `npm run build` ŌĆö succeeds.

task.name: Delete unused EditableNumberCell component
task.action: 1. Search for any imports: `grep -r "EditableNumberCell" src/` 2. If zero results (besides the file itself), delete `src/components/tables/cells/EditableNumberCell.tsx`. 3. Check if the `src/components/tables/cells/` directory is now empty. If so, delete it too.
task.verify: 1. `grep -r "EditableNumberCell" src/` ŌĆö zero results. 2. `npm run lint` ŌĆö no errors. 3. `npm run build` ŌĆö succeeds.
